title: hartia villosa var. serrata
intro: Hartia villosa var. serrata, also known as the hairy or serrated hartia, is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hartia villosa var. serrata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
